summary_one_line: ICC profile color-space signature field (offsets 0x10-0x13) must equal the literal 'Lab ' (4C 61 62 20) so srcCS == cmsSigLabData.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The 4-byte color-space signature field at offsets 0x10-0x13 of the ICC profile header (the value cmsGetColorSpace returns) must equal the FOURCC literal 'Lab ' = 4C 61 62 20. The blocker `if (srcCS == cmsSigLabData)` is an exact equality against this magic constant; any other signature (e.g. 'RGB ') takes the false branch.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Every winner-resolving seed carries 4C 61 62 20 ('Lab ') at offsets 0x10-0x13 (e.g. winner seeds show 'Lab FCLR', 'Lab MCHE', 'Lab 2CLR', 'Lab Lab '), and the byte-diff confirms offsets 0x10-0x12 are concentrated on 4C/61/62 in W. cmplog/vpc reach this exact magic via I2SRandReplace.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds carry 52 47 42 20 ('RGB ') at offsets 0x10-0x13 (e.g. 'RGB XYZ '), so srcCS != cmsSigLabData and they take the false branch; naive/value_profile lack I2SRandReplace and never substitute the exact 'Lab ' literal at this offset.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog and value_profile_cmplog add I2SRandReplace: the equality `srcCS == cmsSigLabData` is logged into the CmpLogObserver buffer with the constant operand cmsSigLabData ('Lab '), and I2SRandReplace splices that operand into the input at the offset holding the current signature, flipping the branch. naive and plain value_profile have no I2S mutator and so cannot substitute the exact 4-byte magic literal at the signature offset, leaving them blocked all 10 trials.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is an exact equality of the source color space against the cmsSigLabData magic constant.
srcCS is the color space signature read from the parsed profile via cmsGetColorSpace.
Winner-resolving seeds carry the 'Lab ' literal at offsets 0x10-0x13.
Loser-blocking seeds carry the 'RGB ' signature, not 'Lab ', at offsets 0x10-0x13.
Offsets 0x10-0x12 are the discriminating field: W is concentrated on 4C/61/62 while L is dominated by 52/47/42, tagged DIFFER.
The winning side (true branch) is globally blocked for naive and value_profile across all 10 trials.
cmplog and value_profile_cmplog add I2SRandReplace which substitutes a logged CMP operand at matching input offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
`I2SRandReplace` reads the post-execution `CmpLogObserver` buffer,
picks a CMP entry, scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace, leaving only havoc/token mutators.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2427 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed 0c0b46a2da32f565` and observed an I2S-floor row (mutation_op = -) at depth 10 of the 11-level ancestor chain; the tool reported '1 ancestor dash row(s) at depth 10', confirming an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find in the winner's ancestry.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on `srcCS == cmsSigLabData` (4-byte exact magic) where naive/value_profile resolve the true branch at the same rate as cmplog/vpc within the trial budget would refute the I2S-substitution attribution.

weakest_evidence_point: The byte-diff at 0x10-0x13 reflects the raw ICC header bytes, but cmsGetColorSpace returns a parsed/derived signature field, so the exact input offset I2S targets is inferred from seed alignment rather than directly traced through the parser.
